title: Snapshot Integration Test for rt analyse
description: Add a stable integration test that runs rt analyse against a synthetic fixture and captures/asserts the key output sections. Ensures no regression in narrative output.
acceptance_criteria: Integration test build_synthetic_uac_fixture() creates a minimal tar.gz with: chkrootkit/etc_ld_so_preload.txt, memory_dump/output-sockstat, live_response/process/hidden_pids, live_response/process/top_-b_-n1.txt
Test asserts: HIDDEN PROCESSES section present, NETWORK CONNECTIONS section present, CORRELATION FINDINGS section present
Test asserts calibrated language: no 'readdir' or 'getdents' hook claims in output
Test asserts: PID 977 appears in output
